purpose: Registry of provisioning providers that can materialize infrastructure profiles for benchmark cycles.

providers.boundary: Creates and deletes K3s clusters; does not know LocalAI workload semantics.
Represents pre-existing K3s clusters that are not materialized by the provider-backed pipeline.

governanceRules: Infrastructure profiles declare which provider materializes them.
Provider bindings resolve provider-specific configuration without embedding local secrets.
Provider tools remain infrastructure-level components and must not depend on LocalAI scenarios or benchmark semantics.
Provider indexes declare lifecycle policy indexes so execution logic can resolve create/delete behavior through metadata.
Provider-backed cluster deletion must be controlled by lifecycle policy and explicit confirmation, not by ad-hoc command construction.
Provider-backed provisioning integration profiles mediate command execution and evidence capture for provider-backed cycles.
